channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Mercury acquire Satou Sabally from Wings as part of 3-team deal, AP source says
item.description: Satou Sabally is heading to the Phoenix Mercury as part of a three-team trade, a person familiar with the deal told The Associated Press on Friday night. The person spoke on condition of anonymity because the deal hadn't been announced.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Pelicans' Dejounte Murray suffers lower right leg injury and team braces for long absence
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — New Orleans guard Dejounte Murray left the Pelicans’ game against Boston in the first quarter Friday night with an injury to his lower right leg, and the team was bracing to be without him for an extended period once again.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rangers get center J.T. Miller from Canucks in multiplayer deal
item.description: The New York Rangers acquired veteran center J.T. Miller from the Vancouver Canucks in a multiplayer deal on Friday night. The Rangers sent center Filip Chytil, defenseman Victor Mancini and a 2025 conditional draft pick to Vancouver.
item.dc:creator: VIN A. CHERWOO, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Tennis Hall of Famer Pam Shriver's trophies are back after being taken in stolen car amid LA fires
item.description: International Tennis Hall of Fame member Pam Shriver has her trophies back, regaining the dozen or so pieces of hardware that were in a car stolen from the hotel where she was staying after evacuating from her home during the spread of devastating wildfires in the greater Los Angeles area.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Sepp Straka leads by 3 at Pebble Beach as rough weather awaits the weekend
item.description: Straka's hot start leaves Rory McIlroy, Scottie Scheffler and everyone having to chase him on the Central Coast.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Jets hire Tanner Engstrand as offensive coordinator and Chris Banjo as special teams coordinator
item.description: The New York Jets hired Detroit Lions passing game coordinator Tanner Engstrand as their offensive coordinator and Denver Broncos assistant special teams coach Chris Banjo as their special teams coordinator on Friday.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The NCAA settles lawsuit with Tennessee and Virginia over compensation rules for recruits
item.description: The NCAA has settled the lawsuit with the attorneys general of Tennessee and Virginia and other states over its rules prohibiting name, image and likeness compensation for recruits. Notice that a settlement has been reached in principle with a term sheet signed was filed Friday with the U.S.
item.dc:creator: TERESA M. WALKER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Former head coach Gonzalez returns to Quakes in a new role
item.description: Gonzalez was the Quakes' head coach from 2023-2024 and now will oversee San Jose's youth development program.
item.dc:creator: Laurence Miedema, The Mercury News

item.title: Super Bowl bettors in California have a workaround
item.description: Though Californians looking to place bets on the upcoming Super Bowl LIX are limited by state law banning the practice, a loophole appears to let bettors wager legally.
item.dc:creator: Cameron Kiszla, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The NCAA settles lawsuit with Tennessee and Virginia over compensation rules for recruits
item.description: The NCAA has settled the lawsuit with the attorneys general of Tennessee and Virginia and other states over its rules prohibiting name, image and likeness compensation for recruits.
item.dc:creator: Teresa M. Walker, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: At least 18 objections filed to $2.8B NCAA antitrust settlement, lawyers confident of approval
item.description: The deadline has come and gone for objections to be filed against the landmark $2.8 billion settlement of antitrust allegations against the NCAA and the five largest athletic conferences.
item.dc:creator: Eddie Pells, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Terry Rozier declines to address investigation, says he won't have issue focusing on basketball
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Terry Rozier declined to answer questions Friday about the investigations by federal prosecutors into unusual betting patterns surrounding his play in a game when he was with the Charlotte Hornets in 2023.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Each of the young figure skaters killed in the DC plane crash had a story waiting to be told
item.description: The young figure skaters whose lives were cut tragically short Wednesday night when an American Airlines flight collided with an Army helicopter and crashed into the Potomac River were just beginning their journeys to stardom.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Arch Manning says Peyton and Eli gave him wedgies and bullied him to make him tougher
item.description: Texas Longhorns quarterback Arch Manning said he has been bullied by his famous uncles Peyton and Eli, and they have even given him wedgies.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jazz drop eighth straight with 138-113 loss to Minnesota
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Anthony Edwards scored 16 of his 36 points in the third quarter and the Minnesota Timberwolves routed the Utah 138-113 on Thursday for their fifth straight victory and second in two nights.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Declan Doyle: The 28-year-old COO of Ben Johnson's offense
item.description: Declan Doyle, a 28-year-old Iowan, is the new offensive coordinator for the Chicago Bears, tasked with creating buy-in and being the COO of Ben Johnson's offense.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: One of the Oklahoma's best high school wrestling team's season suspended
item.description: A disciplinary decision from the Oklahoma Secondary Schools Activities Association (OSSAA) has ended the season for the girls wrestling team at Edmond North High School.
item.dc:creator: Sydnee Batzlaff/KFOR, NewsNation

item.title: Porzingis hits eight 3s, scores 34 as Bulls open 3-game road trip with blowout loss in Boston
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Kristaps Porzingis scored 26 of his season-high 34 points in the first half Wednesday night, and the Boston Celtics coasted to a 122-100 victory over the Bulls in the first game of Chicago's three-game road trip.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Lions agree to hire Broncos' John Morton as OC and promote Kelvin Sheppard to DC, AP source says
item.description: The Detroit Lions have agreed to hire Denver Broncos assistant John Morton as offensive coordinator and promote Kelvin Sheppard to defensive coordinator, according to a person familiar with the situation.
item.dc:creator: LARRY LAGE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bucs QB Baker Mayfield to make second Pro Bowl appearance
item.description: Tampa Bay Buccaneers quarterback Baker Mayfield was named to the 2025 Pro Bowl Games on Tuesday, marking his second appearance in two years.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Lillard, Antetokounmpo lead Bucks past Jazz
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Former Weber State star Damian Lillard and Giannis Antetokounmpo and Damian Lillard each scored 35 points to lead the Milwaukee Bucks to a 125-110 victory over the Utah Jazz on Monday night. Utah has now lost six straight games, falling to 10-34 on the season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
